code: import React,{useState,useEffect,useCallback}from'react';import Dashboard from'./pages/Dashboard';import Positions from'./pages/Positions';import Rules from'./pages/Rules';import History NAV=[{id:'dashboard',label:'Dashboard',icon:'⬡'},{id:'positions',label:'Positions',icon:'◈'},{id:'rules',label:'SL/TP Rules',icon:'◎'},{id:'copytrading',label:'Copy
